evals.prompt: Generate images for content/articles/prompting-e-workflow.mdx — create a cover/poster SVG for the article card and any inline diagrams that would genuinely help readers understand the prompting concepts.
evals.expected_output: A cover SVG (800x450), 1-3 inline diagram SVGs for key concepts, and a modified MDX with image references and updated coverImage frontmatter.

assertions.text: A cover SVG file exists named with the article slug (e.g. prompting-e-workflow-cover.svg)
Cover SVG has width="800" height="450" (16:9 aspect ratio)
SVG(s) use the project's purple accent color (#7c3aed or similar purple hex)
article-modified.mdx has coverImage field in frontmatter
article-modified.mdx contains at least one inline image reference (![) for a diagram

evals.prompt: The article content/articles/cli-vs-ide-agenti-ai.mdx needs a cover image for the article card, and diagrams comparing CLI vs IDE approaches where it would help readers.
evals.expected_output: A cover SVG with CLI vs IDE visual motif, comparison diagram(s), and modified MDX with image references.

assertions.text: A cover SVG file exists for the CLI vs IDE article
At least one comparison/diagram SVG is generated (not just the cover) showing CLI vs IDE differences
article-modified.mdx has coverImage field in frontmatter

evals.prompt: Generate diagrams for content/articles/multi-modello-copilot-cli-orchestrazione.mdx to explain the multi-model orchestration architecture. Also create a cover image.
evals.expected_output: Architecture diagram(s) showing multi-model flow, a cover SVG, and modified MDX with image references.

assertions.text: A cover SVG file exists for the multi-model article
At least one architecture/flow diagram SVG is generated showing model orchestration
article-modified.mdx has coverImage field in frontmatter
Multiple SVG files generated (cover + at least one diagram) — multi-model orchestration is complex enough to warrant multiple visuals
